'''鈭歯-h-th-w''' ('''kanahthewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hold|hold]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-h-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hold|hold]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-h-th-w
|-
! Lemma
| kanahthewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinahthewoko|thinahthewoko]] || [[word:jinahthewoko|jinahthewoko]] || [[word:shinahthewoko|shinahthewoko]] || [[word:kinahthewoko|kinahthewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunahthewoko|thuthunahthewoko]] || [[word:jujunahthewoko|jujunahthewoko]] || [[word:shushunahthewoko|shushunahthewoko]] || [[word:kukunahthewoko|kukunahthewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonahthewoko|thothonahthewoko]] || [[word:jojonahthewoko|jojonahthewoko]] || [[word:shoshonahthewoko|shoshonahthewoko]] || [[word:kokonahthewoko|kokonahthewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonahthewoko|thonahthewoko]] || [[word:jonahthewoko|jonahthewoko]] || [[word:shonahthewoko|shonahthewoko]] || [[word:konahthewoko|konahthewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonahthewoko|thonahthewoko]] || [[word:jonahthewoko|jonahthewoko]] || [[word:shonahthewoko|shonahthewoko]] || [[word:konahthewoko|konahthewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nahthewoko|th忙nahthewoko]] || [[word:j忙nahthewoko|j忙nahthewoko]] || [[word:sh忙nahthewoko|sh忙nahthewoko]] || [[word:k忙nahthewoko|k忙nahthewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanahthewoko|thathanahthewoko]] || [[word:jajanahthewoko|jajanahthewoko]] || [[word:shashanahthewoko|shashanahthewoko]] || [[word:kakanahthewoko|kakanahthewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanahthewoko|thanahthewoko]] || [[word:janahthewoko|janahthewoko]] || [[word:shanahthewoko|shanahthewoko]] || [[word:kanahthewoko|kanahthewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanahthewoko|thanahthewoko]] || [[word:janahthewoko|janahthewoko]] || [[word:shanahthewoko|shanahthewoko]] || [[word:kanahthewoko|kanahthewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
